caption: An advertisement for VirtualShield features a woman with red hair wearing dark-rimmed glasses and a black top. She is positioned on the right side of the screen, looking toward the left. The left side of the image contains a dark gray background with white and red text. The top displays the "VirtualShield" logo and the bold phrases "Stay Home, Stay Protected." and "Extra 50% OFF". Below this, a paragraph of smaller white text discusses the current economic trends and the importance of staying safe online. A large white price tag reads "$2.50 /month". At the bottom, a red button says "Start Now for FREE", followed by the instruction, "Click the button above to claim your 10% discount!". Across the sequence of frames, the visual elements, including the woman's pose, the text, and the layout, remain completely static.
